questions.text: You are preparing for Microsoft Azure Security Engineer Associate and reviewing Secure identity and access. Which source aligns with official Microsoft Learn and Azure documentation?

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must require MFA based on risk signals. What should they do FIRST?
